sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE, interval_duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO test_intervals (id, event_date, interval_duration) VALUES (1, DATE '2023-01-01', INTERVAL '1 year 2 months');
SELECT id, event_date + interval_duration AS new_date FROM test_intervals;
UPDATE test_intervals SET interval_duration = INTERVAL '5 days' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, DATE '2023-01-15' - interval_duration AS adjusted_date FROM test_intervals;
